A WRONG CASE NUMBER HAD BEEN INADVERTENTLY STAMPED ON THE ORIGINALS OF THE COMPLAINT, SUMMONS, CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS, AND ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. CORRECTION HAD BEEN MADE TO REFLECT THE CORRECT CASE NUMBER. THE ABOVE-MENTIONED DOCUMENTS HAD BEEN RE-SCANNED.

calendar.matters:
Order Granting Ex Parte Application For Dismissal
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: appellant, janet stanford, present. respondent attorney, andrew gschwind, present. matter submitted.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2007 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John P. Aubrey of the Office of the City Attorney, 554-3968, appearing for defendant and moving party
Janet Stanford, 648-1579, plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona

The Court made a personal disclosure and, no objections having been raised, the matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BERT DONLIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
